rationale: Decomposed DI-34 into 6 clauses; each has a covering assertion and an executed KILLED mutation probe. (a) *_test.yml scanned: set(tags)=={DI-7,DI-8,DI-9} + tags[DI-7] path assertion; removing *_test.yml from TEST_FILE_GLOBS KILLED. (b) *_test.yaml scanned: DI-9 lives in playbook_test.yaml; removing *_test.yaml KILLED. (c) ID-shaped tags count as story tags (inline-list DI-7, block-list DI-8, scalar DI-9): breaking ANSIBLE_ID_TAG to r'^$' KILLED. (d) non-ID operational tags ignored: explicit 'always'/'bootstrap' not-in assertions plus set equality; dropping the ANSIBLE_ID_TAG.match filter in _yaml_tag_ids KILLED. (e) non-test YAML not scanned: group_vars.yml carries DI-6 which set equality excludes; widening globs to *.yml/*.yaml KILLED. (f) whole-file scope: sources[DI-7]==[full file text] and sources[DI-8] likewise; truncating the non-py append in scan_tagged_sources to the first line KILLED. Extra: disabling the yaml branch in _tag_ids_in (return []) KILLED. File restored after every probe (md5 verified).
